summary: Clean, well-targeted fix migrating 4 Perps hooks and 1 view from the legacy selected-account selector to the account-group EVM selector, preventing ValiError crashes for non-EVM accounts. All 187 tests pass, runtime validation confirms no ValiError.

comments.body: This mock for `selectSelectedInternalAccountFormattedAddress` is now dead code — the production file no longer imports from `accountsController`. Consider removing this mock block to avoid confusion about which selector is actually being used.
